title: Substack vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Ghost?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
